# `@byted-service/fnv`

## Usage

```ts
import { logIdHash } from '@byted-service/fnv'

logIdHash('021623417764447fe80000000000000aede48fffe001122c9eb05') // BigInt(6426987764437418222n)
```

## Performance

```bash
Running "Hash log id" suite...
Progress: 100%

  Rust:
    3 415 150 ops/s, ±2.62%   | fastest

  JavaScript:
    42 040 ops/s, ±0.93%      | slowest, 98.77% slower

Finished 2 cases!
  Fastest: Rust
  Slowest: JavaScript
```

## Build addons

- Install latest stable `Rust`: https://rustup.rs
- Install `zig` for cross compilation

### macOS

- Install latest `xcode`

#### `darwin-x64`

```bash
rustup target add x86_64-apple-darwin

yarn install

# Build on macOS

yarn build --target x86_64-apple-darwin

# Build on the others platform
yarn build --target x86_64-apple-darwin --zig
```

#### `darwin-arm64`

```bash
rustup target add aarch64-apple-darwin

yarn install

# Build on macOS
yarn build --target aarch64-apple-darwin

# Build on the others platform
yarn build --target aarch64-apple-darwin --zig
```

### Linux

#### `linux-x64-gnu`

```bash
rustup target add x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu

yarn install

# Build on Linux
yarn build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu

# Build on the others platform
yarn build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --zig
```

#### `linux-aarch64-gnu`

```bash
rustup target add aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu

yarn install

# Build on Linux
yarn build --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu

# Build on the others platform
yarn build --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu --zig
```

## Testing

### macOS

```
yarn test
```

### Linux

#### x64

```
yarn install --ignore-platform --force

docker run --rm -it -v $(pwd):/fnv -w /fnv node:lts-slim yarn test
```

## Publish a new version

```bash
# Make sure you have installed the latest dependencies
yarn install

# Make sure to run this command locally
# So that the `version` lifecycle script in `package.json` will be executed
npm version patch|minor|major|custom version

git push --follow-tags
```
